spec.description: ROCm AMD Infinity Context System: KV cache storage, LMCache, vLLM inference, and GPU metrics. AIC storage may be local block device, hipfile, NFS, or other backends — use optional NFS panels only when the cache is NFS-mounted.

spec.title: Server and GPU Power
spec.description: GPU power from amd_metrics_exporter. Server PDU power appears only when server_power_metric is set (Dashboard settings → Variables).

spec.title: GPU Activity
spec.description: The activity factor of the CUs and UMC in the GPU. This is given as a percentage of total compute power available.

spec.title: VRAM Utilization
spec.description: The amount of VRAM currently in use.

spec.title: KV Cache Block I/O (local device)
spec.description: Read/write bandwidth on the selected block device(s). Use for local NVMe, dm-crypt, or other direct-attached AIC storage — not NFS client traffic (see optional NFS panels below).

spec.title: LMCache Store and Retrieve Requests
spec.description: The total number of LMCache Store and Retrieve requests.

spec.title: Token Rate by Source
spec.description: The tokens per second from compute, local CPU cache and AIC cache.

spec.title: AIC KV Cache Block File Count
spec.description: The total count of KV Cache Blocks on the AIC storage device.

spec.title: AIC Free Capacity
spec.description: The capacity remaining on the ROCm AIC storage system.

spec.title: KV Cache Block Hit Statistics (.data)
spec.description: Hit distribution across on-disk LMCache .data files. NIXL-only deployments (obj_*.bin, no .data) use the NIXL Chunk Lookup Stats row below instead.

spec.title: RDMA Bandwidth to AIC Storage
spec.description: RDMA throughput to the storage backend when RoCE is in use (optional; not applicable to all AIC deployments).

spec.title: TPOT
spec.description: Average time between output tokens

spec.title: vLLM - AIC Hit Ratio
spec.description: External prefix cache (LMCache / KV connector) hit ratio from vllm:external_prefix_cache_* counters.

spec.title: Output Tokens per Second
spec.description: The average output tokens per second.

spec.title: NFS Server Bandwidth (optional)
spec.description: Kernel NFS server read/write throughput on the selected node. Only populated on nodes that export the AIC cache; expect No data on GPU clients or when AIC is local/NVMe.

spec.title: NFS Client Bandwidth (optional)
spec.description: NFS client throughput for the AIC cache mount (rocm_aic_nfs_mount_*). Set nfs_mount to your mount path when AIC is NFS-backed; leave nfs_mount as ^$ for local NVMe, hipfile, or other non-NFS storage.

spec.title: ROCm Version
spec.description: The version of ROCm running on the given node(s).

spec.title: Online GPUs
spec.description: GPUs reporting amd_gpu_package_power on the selected node(s).

spec.title: Time to First Token
spec.description: Time-to-first-token from vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket; p50, p90, and p99 over $__rate_interval.

spec.title: TTFT p99
spec.description: Latest p99 time-to-first-token for the selected vLLM target(s) and model(s).

spec.title: AIC Prefix Hit Ratio
spec.description: External prefix cache hit ratio (LMCache / KV connector) for selected vLLM instances.

spec.title: KV Chunk Bytes
spec.description: Total on-disk LMCache .data chunk bytes (rocm_aic_kv_chunk_bytes_total).

spec.title: AIC Storage Free %
spec.description: Free space percentage on the AIC data filesystem.

spec.title: AIC KV Cache Footprint
spec.description: On-disk LMCache chunk bytes and used NIXL pool slots/bytes (0-byte slots excluded).

spec.title: Distinct Chunk Hashes
spec.description: Unique chunk hashes seen in chunk_hashes JSONL (NIXL and .data modes).

spec.title: Chunk Lookup Rows
spec.description: chunk_hashes JSONL rows scanned by rocm-aic-exporter.

spec.title: Hash Mention Sum
spec.description: Total chunk hash mentions across all JSONL lookup rows.

spec.title: Hot Chunks (>10 lookups)
spec.description: Percentage of distinct chunk hashes with more than 10 JSONL lookup mentions (sum of 11-20, 21-50, 51-100, and >100 buckets).

spec.title: NIXL Chunk Lookup Distribution
spec.description: How many distinct chunk hashes fall into each JSONL lookup mention bucket. Populated for NIXL (obj_*.bin) and hipfile (.data) when chunk statistics are enabled; measures lookup references per hash, not per NIXL pool slot.

spec.title: ROCm(tm) AMD Infinity Context Dashboard

spec.name: host
spec.label: Host
spec.description: Prometheus instance for node_exporter and amd_metrics_exporter (Ansible clusters use the inventory hostname for both).

spec.name: vllm_instance
spec.label: vLLM Instance
spec.description: vLLM exporter target (host:port) for latency and token metrics.

spec.name: model
spec.label: LLM Model
spec.description: LLM model_name label on vLLM metrics.

spec.name: gpu_id
spec.label: GPU ID
spec.description: GPU id from amd_metrics_exporter on the selected host(s).

spec.name: blkdevice
spec.label: Block Device
spec.description: Block device on the selected node(s) for KV storage bandwidth.

spec.name: rdma_device
spec.label: RDMA Device
spec.description: RDMA port on the selected node(s); used when the storage backend is reachable over RoCE (optional).

spec.name: nfs_mount
spec.label: NFS Mount (optional)
spec.description: Regex for AIC NFS client mount path. Default ^$ disables NFS client panels (use for local NVMe, hipfile, or other non-NFS AIC). Set to your mount (for example /mnt/rocm-icms-cache) when the cache is NFS-backed.

spec.name: server_power_metric
spec.label: Server Power Metric
spec.description: Regex for optional PDU power metric; ^$ disables the series.
